# CWE-213 positive: exposes staff-only salary in public profile API (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-213-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type staffProfile struct {
	FullName string `json:"full_name"`
	Unit     string `json:"unit"`
	Comp     int    `json:"comp"`
}

// CWE-213 Exposure of Sensitive Information Due to Incompatible Policies
// Vulnerable line: comp included in response for any authenticated user.
func ShowColleague(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, roster map[string]staffProfile) {
	id := r.PathValue("id")
	profile, ok := roster[id]
	if !ok {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(profile)
}
